description: A research lab is receiving concentrated Hydrogen Peroxide (>60%, UN 2015, CAS 7722-84-1) and needs a storage compatibility assessment using CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/). Conduct a compatibility assessment between Hydrogen Peroxide (>60%) and the chemicals listed in ~/Desktop/storage_compatibility_query.txt. Save a comprehensive compatibility report to ~/Documents/h2o2_compatibility_report.txt that includes the reactive groups for H2O2, all incompatible reactive groups, specific hazardous chemical matches from the Room 215 list, and storage recommendations.
